prompt: Deep stack proxy: choose the best action.
why_v1: Call controls risk when depth edge is not strong enough to raise.
feedback_correct_v1: Correct. Calling fits because deep stacks keep both ranges playable, so control matters more than forcing a marginal edge.
feedback_incorrect_v1: Incorrect. Call is better when deep stacks keep both ranges playable, because a controlled continue preserves maneuverability instead of inflating the pot on a marginal edge.
